item.title: 🚨 BIG NEWS: Scientists just created Schrödinger-Like quantum states using only 6 molecules. Today's computers are built from billions of transistors. Tomorrow's quantum technologies might be built fro
item.description: p🚨 BIG NEWS: Scientists just created Schrödinger-Like quantum states using only 6 molecules.br /br /Today's computers are built from billions of transistors.br /br /Tomorrow's quantum technologies might be built from just a handful of molecules 👀br /br /"Researchers built a tiny 6-molecule cluster w

item.title: R to @SciTechera: The Quantum Insider: https://thequantuminsider.com/2026/07/21/saxon-q-diamond-nv-center-quantum-computers/ Quantum Computing Report: https://quantumcomputingreport.com/saxon-q-launch

WHITE HOUSE ACCUSES CHINESE AI STARTUP MOONSHOT OF ILLEGALLY USING BANNED NVIDIA BLACKWELL CHIPS AND DISTILLING U.S. AI MODELS TO DEVELOP ITS KIMI K3 MODEL; OFFICIALS SAY RESTRICTED CHIPS MAY HAVE BEE
item.description: pWHITE HOUSE ACCUSES CHINESE AI STARTUP MOONSHOT OF ILLEGALLY USING BANNED NVIDIA BLACKWELL CHIPS AND DISTILLING U.S. AI MODELS TO DEVELOP ITS KIMI K3 MODEL; OFFICIALS SAY RESTRICTED CHIPS MAY HAVE BEEN ACCESSED THROUGH THAILAND IN VIOLATION OF U.S. EXPORT CONTROLSbr /br /MOONSHOT HAS NOT RESPONDED
